# EGLO 99099

|     |     |
|-----|-----|
| Model | 99099  |
| Vendor  | [EGLO](/supported-devices/#v=EGLO)  |
| Description | 3 groups remote controller |
| Exposes | action, action_group, action_level, action_color_temperature |
| Picture | ![EGLO 99099](https://www.zigbee2mqtt.io/images/devices/99099.png) |



<!-- Notes BEGIN: You can edit here. Add "## Notes" headline if not already present. -->
### Unsupported buttons
The group buttons 1, 2, or 3 and the buttons for the two favorite buttons (heart) cannot be used via a Zigbee network, 
as the remote control only sends the events directly to the light when directly paired with an EGLO light.
<!-- Notes END: Do not edit below this line -->




## Exposes

### Action (enum)
Triggered action (e.g. a button click).
Value can be found in the published state on the `action` property.
It's not possible to read (`/get`) or write (`/set`) this value.
The possible values are: `on`, `off`, `red`, `red_long`, `refresh`, `refresh_long`, `refresh_colored`, `refresh_colored_long`, `blue`, `blue_long`, `green`, `green_long`, `brightness_step_up`, `brightness_step_down`, `brightness_move_to_level`, `color_temperature_step_up`, `color_temperature_step_down`, `color_temperature_move`, `recall_1`, `recall_1_long`, `recall_2`, `recall_2_long`.

### Action group (numeric)
Value can be found in the published state on the `action_group` property.
It's not possible to read (`/get`) or write (`/set`) this value.

### Action level (numeric)
Value can be found in the published state on the `action_level` property.
It's not possible to read (`/get`) or write (`/set`) this value.

### Action color temperature (numeric)
Value can be found in the published state on the `action_color_temperature` property.
It's not possible to read (`/get`) or write (`/set`) this value.
